'''zahaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbobomkulite|mbobomkulite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbobomkulite|mbobomkulite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zahaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæhæbæth|zæhæbæth]] || [[word:zæhæbæj|zæhæbæj]] || [[word:zæhæbæsh|zæhæbæsh]] || [[word:zæhæbæ|zæhæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahahabath|zahahabath]] || [[word:zahahabaj|zahahabaj]] || [[word:zahahabash|zahahabash]] || [[word:zahahaba|zahahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahabath|zahabath]] || [[word:zahabaj|zahabaj]] || [[word:zahabash|zahabash]] || [[word:zahaba|zahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahafbath|zahafbath]] || [[word:zahafbaj|zahafbaj]] || [[word:zahafbash|zahafbash]] || [[word:zahafbaf|zahafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zahabatha|zahabatha]] || [[word:zahabaja|zahabaja]] || [[word:zahabasha|zahabasha]] || [[word:zahabaka|zahabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zahabath|zahabath]] || [[word:zahabaj|zahabaj]] || [[word:zahabash|zahabash]] || [[word:zahaba|zahaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zahabathal|zahabathal]] || [[word:zahabajal|zahabajal]] || [[word:zahabashal|zahabashal]] || [[word:zahabakal|zahabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zahabathatha|zahabathatha]] || [[word:zahabajaja|zahabajaja]] || [[word:zahabashasha|zahabashasha]] || [[word:zahabaka|zahabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zahabathan|zahabathan]] || [[word:zahabajan|zahabajan]] || [[word:zahabashan|zahabashan]] || [[word:zahabakan|zahabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zahabathaoro|zahabathaoro]] || [[word:zahabajaoro|zahabajaoro]] || [[word:zahabashaoro|zahabashaoro]] || [[word:zahabakaoro|zahabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
